tests.description: Verifies that a user can begin registration by submitting their email and receiving a 6-digit verification code.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: A valid email submission triggers a 6-digit verification code to be sent to the user

tests.description: Verifies that entering the correct verification code successfully logs the user in and gives them access to their account.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The user is authenticated and their account is accessible after entering the right code

tests.description: Verifies that entering an incorrect verification code prevents login and shows an appropriate error to the user.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The user sees a verification error and is not granted access when submitting a wrong code

tests.description: Verifies that a logged-in user can successfully log out and is returned to the home page in an unauthenticated state.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The user's session is ended and they are redirected to the home page without authentication

tests.description: Verifies that a logged-in user can permanently delete their account, after which the account no longer exists.

test_coverage.what_it_checks: The user's account is fully removed from the system after confirming deletion
